_comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for data privacy labels. DEFAULT = private. Only sources labeled public (or matching a public rule) may be sent to the CLOUD LLM; everything else must be processed by the private model. Mislabeling private data as public causes a leak, so keep this list conservative and explicit.

rules._web_note: Anything obtained from a public website is public. Scrapers/ingest that pull from the open web tag their output 'public'.

_public_paths_note: List ONLY documents you'd be comfortable publishing: user manuals, public price lists, marketing material. Customer data, emails, CRM, financials stay private by default.
drop_convention: When the owner drops a document and says it's public, add its ingested path to public_paths at ingest time; otherwise it is private.
